prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类大幅缩招62.5%的核心驱动，位次 将显著前移；但河北省物理类考生微增、学校抖音高热关注度及省控线上升等因素部分抵消缩招效应。预测2026年物理类最低位次约16971名，区间16471–17471名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 14703 → 18065 → 20607 → 21772 → 27073, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 12370 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 27073 in 2025; the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 33, 23, 30, 32, and 40 respectively, reaching a peak of 40 in 2025; in 2026, the planned enrollment sharply drops to 15, a significant reduction of 62.5% compared to 2025, leading to a substantial decrease in supply, intensified competition, and an expected significant forward shift in rankings. 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026, it is approximately 63rd, with recent rankings stable in the 62–71 range, belonging to the upper-middle level.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a teacher ethics incident, but its overall Douyin popularity ranking was 15th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 3.57 million, high short video exposure, and undiminished application attention; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, 3 A- disciplines, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, directly related to enrollment majors such as Education and Psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher-training/education majors in 2024 was in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see (55.84), overall stable; the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 609,800, a slight increase from about 606,800 in 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 366,000, a slight increase; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch rose from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an upward trend; Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university, with enrollment in Hebei Province accounting for about 3% (18 out of 598 nationally in 2025), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the core driver of a significant 62.5% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, rankings will significantly shift forward; however, factors such as a slight increase in Hebei Physics Category candidates, high Douyin popularity of the school, and the rising provincial control line partially offset the enrollment reduction effect. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 16971, with a range of 16471–17471.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<16471), focus on popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>17471), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1813 → 2811 → 3558 → 3124 → 3836, showing an overall backward trend. In 2024, it slightly recovered to 3124, but fell back to 3836 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2023 places over the past 4 years.
2. [Enrollment Plan] From 2021 to 2025, the planned number of History Category students was 12, 18, 18, 20, and 20 respectively, increasing slightly year by year; in 2026, the plan increases to 23, an expansion of 15% compared to 2025, increasing supply and slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2024, there was a somewhat negative evaluation due to a teacher ethics incident, but the overall Douyin popularity ranked 15th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 3.57 million and high short video exposure; in 2021, Douyin ranked 1st (handwritten admission letter incident), overall attention is relatively high; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, 3 A- disciplines, directly related to History Category enrollment majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Education, etc., with strong disciplinary strength; 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 63rd, with stable rankings in the 62–71 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher/education majors in 2024 was differentiated and wait-and-see (55.84), overall stable; Chinese language/Chinese majors in 2024 were recommended (60.0), slightly hot; the total number of Hebei Province college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 609,800, with History Category candidates estimated at about 244,000 based on the recent proportion of about 40%, roughly the same as 2025; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, showing an upward trend; Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university in Hebei Province, with History Category enrollment in Hebei accounting for about 0.8% (20 people in 2025 / about 2,500 nationwide), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the mitigating effect of a 15% expansion in History Category in 2026, the basically unchanged number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province, the high Douyin heat attention of the school, and the advantages of teacher-training disciplines, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 4151, with a range of 3651–4651.
